title: Indigo Bhujodi Shirt
subtitle: Hand-loomed Kala Cotton, Natural Indigo
description: A relaxed-fit shirt cut from indigo-dyed Kala cotton, woven with a subtle Bhujodi extra-weft border along the cuffs and hem. Breathable, slightly textured, and built to soften with every wash.
craftStory: The indigo used here is built up over multiple natural dye baths, the traditional way — deeper, more uneven, and far slower than synthetic indigo dyeing. Cut and stitched by a small tailoring partner working exclusively with our handloom cloth.
dyeProcess: Natural indigo, multiple dye-dip process for depth of colour
careInstructions: Cold hand-wash inside-out for the first 3 washes to set the indigo. Shade dry. Some colour transfer onto light fabrics is normal with natural indigo.
details: Hand-loomed Bhujodi border detail at cuffs and hem
